case_title: G & M TRANSPORTATION INC., DBA B & W CHECKER CAB VS BERKELEY FARMS et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT BERKELEY FARMS RECOVER FROM CROSS DEFENDANT G & M TRANSPORTATION INC., DBA B & W CHECKER CAB $423.99 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $473.99, ALVARO JOSE ROMERO JR IS DISMISSED W/ PREJUDICE. VLADIMIR KRYUKOV IS DISMISSED W/O PREJUDICE. VLADIMIR KRYUKOV IS NOT A PLAINTIFF & THEREFORE CANNOT BE SUED BY BERKELEY FARMS ON THE COUNTER CLAIM. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
CERT MAIL SENT TO CT CORP SYSTEM BERKELEY FARMS INC RETURNED SIGNED

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ROMERO, ALVARO JOSE JR.
DEFENDANT REQUEST FOR A CONTINUANCE TO BE SIGNED BY JUDGE, DATE REQUESTED IS 4/25/01 10:00 AM. $10.00 FEE PAID.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF G & M TRANSPORTATION INC., DBA B & W CHECKER CAB IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT BERKELEY FARMS ROMERO, ALVARO JOSE JR. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
